entities.name: Lying About Context

entities.name: Resume Limitation

relationships.context: V explaining the context insight to Anthony during conversation
V is the founder of Careerspan
V articulates this as the core category insight
V asserts resumes cannot capture unique specifics about a person
The context lie stems from apps treating resumes as sufficient context
Voice capture addresses the context problem that other apps fail to solve
